headline: Ralph Lauren's Margin Expansion: Sustainable Upside Ahead?

headline: Q4 Earnings Roundup: Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) And The Rest Of The Consumer Discretionary - Apparel and Accessories Segment
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the consumer discretionary - apparel and accessories industry, including Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) and its peers.
